Arya Flint
Arya Flint (left) and Marna Locke by coldraindropsss

Books

  • A Storm of Swords (mentioned)

Arya Flint was a noblewoman of House Flint of the mountains. She was married to Rodrik Stark, the fifth son of Lord Beron Stark, with whom she had two daughters; Branda and Lyarra Stark.[1]

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Storm of Swords
  • 3 Family
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Arya died before her grandson Eddard Stark was born.[3]

Recent Events[ ]

A Storm of Swords[ ]

While traveling by the northern mountains, Bran Stark recalls that his great-grandmother was a Flint of the mountains and that Old Nan used to claim that it was her blood that gave Bran his interest in climbing.[3]
